title: Poly Network - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Multisig compromise leading to cross-chain withdrawals

prevention.rule: Block any tx that withdraws large amounts on one chain after depositing a small amount on another chain within the same transaction.
prevention.trigger: SMALL_DEPOSIT -> LARGE_WITHDRAWAL in single tx across chains

red_flags: small deposit followed by large withdrawal across chains
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that withdraws large amounts on one chain after depositing a small amount on another chain within the same transaction.
summary: Poly Network was hacked through a compromised multisig, allowing attackers to withdraw large amounts across multiple chains after depositing small amounts. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions that involve small deposits followed by large withdrawals across different chains.
